name: Pat Murray (via VanHollen.org)
subject: be prepared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, we need someone like Chris Van Hollen with a strong record of successfully standing up to the extremist Tea Party agenda and fighting for the values and priorities we share. Election Day is less than 50 days away, and we cannot afford to let up until we reach our goal.

Washington Republicans are ramping up their efforts to turn the tide of this election. In the past month alone, Republican presidential candidate Donald Trump, union-busting Republican Governor Scott Walker and failed Republican presidential candidate Carly Fiorina have all come to Maryland to support GOP efforts here.

We need to be prepared for whatever comes our way -- to do any less would be malpractice.

[**Please, chip in whatever you can right now >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ad4/70cdc2ba/47184ae8/3975485/1874412014/VEsH/ name: Tracy Newman
subject: Can we bank on it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
****What can I take to the bank? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU5ODU5NgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMwOTIwMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend, here's the deal. Soon, I need to give the go-ahead to the bank to transfer funds to get our television ads on the air. Or not. With all the other demands on our resources as we head into the last five weeks, it will all depend on the success of the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign. I can tell you already it's going to be a tough call. Aisling and Diane and the team are running a powerful and effective ground game. Jay will win on Election Day because of their Get Out the Vote efforts. We can't shortchange them. But it makes me really nervous when I remember how Republican Bill Bryant barraged us with ads in the last two weeks of the primary -- thanks to his deep-pocketed buddies. It wasn't pretty -- and those type of big-money-funded ads aren't how our democracy should work. Republican Bill Bryant has wealthy friends willing to pour tens of thousands of dollars into a last-minute ad blitz -- including one of Trump's biggest backers. We have you. **That 's why I'm asking if you can help us raise $25,000 by Friday -- our public end-of-month deadline.** If we make it, we can have our winning ground game AND television ads on the air. body:
| | |

---|---
| | [](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2a08589e83&e=19cebfe173) | [Forward to a Friend](http://us13.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=2a08589e83&e=19cebfe173)
---|---
| ** _IN CASE YOU MISSED IT_**
**Minter's tax charge against Scott flops**
_This commentary is by Emerson Lynn, editor of the St. Albans Messenger_
Sue Minter is ignoring a basic rule in politics: Don’t criticize an opponent for actions you might support. Ms. Minter, the Democratic candidate for governor, did that this week when she was critical of Phil Scott, her Republican opponent, for supporting Act 68 in 2003...

...The reason Ms. Minter has lashed out against Mr. Scott’s decade-ago vote is that she’s being challenged for suggesting she would be open to expanding the sales tax from goods to services, something she does not deny. She now defends that decision by saying she would not expand the tax to services that would burden the middle class.

But that’s as vague as it is unsettling. Defining those choices is difficult and highly political, which is why her suggestion has invited Mr. Scott’s line of questioning. What services would she like to tax? How much money would that generate? Is that the state’s only means by which we can increase our revenue?

It’s a tough line of questioning.

But Ms. Minter can’t escape her circumstance by dredging up a law passed 13 years ago; a law she almost certainly would have supported herself...
_The full editorial is printed in the September 28, 2016 issue of the St. Albans Messenger_

Ms. Minter, the Democratic candidate for governor, did that this week when she was critical of Phil Scott, her Republican opponent, for supporting Act 68 in 2003... ...The reason Ms. Minter has lashed out against Mr. Scott’s decade-ago vote is that she’s being challenged for suggesting she would be open to expanding the sales tax from goods to services, something she does not deny. She now defends that decision by saying she would not expand the tax to services that would burden the middle class. But that’s as vague as it is unsettling. Defining those choices is difficult and highly political, which is why her suggestion has invited Mr. Scott’s line of questioning. What services would she like to tax? How much money would that generate? Is that the state’s only means by which we can increase our revenue? It’s a tough line of questioning. But Ms. Minter can’t escape her circumstance by dredging up a law passed 13 years ago; a law she almost certainly would have supported herself... The full editorial is printed in the September 28, 2016 issue of the St. Albans Messenger | "DONATE TODAY!" | "JOIN THE TEAM!" | | | | | | | | | | | | Phil Scott for Governor, Glen Wright, Treasurer, 46 Three Mile Bridge Road, Middlesex, VT 05602 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or

name: Scott Walker
subject: It's a simple choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, Conservative policies work. Contrary to what the liberal media says, conservative values are the way forward. Let's look at my home state, Wisconsin. Something had to be done. So we took on big government and the labor bosses. The liberals demonized me. They personally insulted me. They even tried to recall me. But we pressed on. We knew we were doing the right thing. We knew conservative policies were the only way to get Wisconsin back on the map. Guess what? We were right. We turned a $3.6 billion deficit into a surplus. Taxes were cut by $4.7 billion. Over 168,000 jobs were added to Wisconsin's economy. Total employment in Wisconsin is higher than it has ever been in our history. And Wisconsin's Labor Force Participation Rate is one of the best in the country. Most importantly, the power of the people was restored to Wisconsinites. Now it's America's turn to choose. We can choose more of the same liberal policies that have weakened our nation. Or We can choose proven conservative values that will get us back on course. The choice is clear. But you can be sure the Democrats will spin their failures into successes -- they'll do anything to keep the truth about their policies under wraps. That's why I hope you'll join me and help Speaker Ryan to secure the House for the future of our nation. name: Ben Carson
subject: Urgent deadline
body:
Peter,

We have just today and tomorrow, and September's over.

It's hard to believe, but October will be our last full month
before Election Day.

Crunch time is here and My Faith Votes has some major deadlines
to hit before this weekend if they are to achieve their goals for
November 8.

I'll get right to the point -- TV and radio PSAs are running
around the country reaching millions, millennials are being
recruited at Christian campuses, weekly live webcasts are being
watched by hundreds of thousands each week, so on and so on.

Thousands of Christians who did not vote in 2012 have been
specifically identified, and My Faith Votes is reaching out
directly to help get them to the polls. Every vote matters,
because our faith matters.

body:
Trump will be writing a $2 million check for our quarterly deadline before the election.|

Friend, As you’ve heard, Donald Trump is going to write a matching check worth up to $2 million for our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election. And he’s tasked me with giving him the list of supporters whose contributions he gets the honor of matching. He’ll also know who stepped up to push us over our end-of-quarter goal. You still have time to get your name on the list to have your contribution personally MATCHED by Donald Trump. The deadline is September 30 at 11:59 PM. Contribute any amount you can spare and I will add your name to the list I hand Donald Trump of donations he will MATCH. CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> $200 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE $65 >>> $130 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> $50 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE $15 >>> $30 THANKS TO TRUMP CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Donald Trump is writing this unprecedented matching check to get your attention, Friend. This is the FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline before the election. This is the time to make massive investments in programs that will decide the fate of this election. By this time next month, it will be too late. The media, Hillary’s research team, the DNC -- everyone who wrote off this movement since day one -- will be waiting to see the success of our final quarterly fundraising report. They’ll want to know if we have what it takes to compete with her Money Machine during the final stretch. I know that we can do it. But we’re going to need every single one of our supporters to step up and make a contribution. This is our opportunity to once again defy all odds and prove the mainstream media and liberal elites wrong. Now contribute before our FINAL FEC end-of-quarter deadline and I will put you on the list of donations Donald Trump gets the honor of MATCHING. Your friend,
Newt Gingrich CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> $200 THANKS TO TRUMP

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: I want your input before the NEXT debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Please make it your priority to fill out the Debate Preparation Survey. |

Friend, The next debate against Hillary Clinton is just 10 days away. I need your immediate feedback from the first debate in order to win the second one. Please take the TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey now. >> The race is close. We can’t leave anything up to chance. But because you got me to where I stand today, I’m turning to you. This is your moment to help shape the direction of the presidential race, and ultimately the direction of our country. Debate preparation is already underway, so you’ll need to get your input in immediately. Friend, I want your honest input. I cannot win this fight alone. body:

---
**DEADLINE: 36 HOURS
$21,844 short of our _critical_ quarterly goal.**
**[_Let 's crush it >>_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8990608865523400704/-6730041404384346112?refcode=e20160929.2&refcode2=e20160929.2nd&amount=25)**
Friends: Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball just released new Senate projections -- and **Pennsylvania is one of only four pure "toss-up" states in the country**. Add that to _NPR_ ranking Pennsylvania as the 4th most-likely Senate seat to flip and it's clear:

**Pennsylvania is a MUST. WIN. STATE for Democrats.** | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8990608865523400704/-6730041404384346112?refcode=e20160929.2&refcode2=e20160929.2nd&amount=25)
---

Team, take a closer look up there ↑, there's **_NOT_** a lot of yellow on that map, but that's where the whole ballgame (control of the Senate AND next Supreme Court justice) is about to be won or lost in 40 short days.

**[FEC DEADLINE: Chip in now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/8990608865523400704/-6730041404384346112?refcode=e20160929.2&refcode2=e20160929.2nd&amount=25)**
If we ease up even a little now, we could get stuck with six more years of Pat Toomey and Mitch McConnell putting Wall Street and special interest groups ahead of Pennsylvania's working families. **Falling short of this goal means taking that risk.**

Luckily, I know our grassroots team is determined to defeat Toomey and his dark money machine, elect Katie, win the Senate, and shape the future of the Supreme Court.

**With our biggest FEC deadline of the campaign TOMORROW -- [Can you make a donation now, before the deadline, to help elect Katie McGinty and win back the Senate?](https://act.myngp.com/el/8990608865523400704/-6730041404384346112?refcode=e20160929.2&refcode2=e20160929.2nd&amount=25)**

Kelley
Digital Team

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.

name: Hillary for Virginia
subject: There's still time to claim your yard sign!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Derek --

Yard signs are on the way, and there’s still time to be the first to hear when they arrive!

**Sign up to receive texts from the campaign in Virginia and we’ll be in touch to make sure you get your yard sign before we run out:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks!

Hillary for Virginia

\-----Forwarded message-----
From: Hillary for Virginia
Subject: Yard signs are heading to an office near you!

Derek --

A new shipment of yard signs is heading to organizing offices across Virginia soon, and we want you to be the first to have one!

[**Show your support for Team Hillary by signing up for texts from the campaign to be the first to know when Clinton-Kaine yard signs arrive in an office near you.**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

With all the divisiveness from the other side during this campaign, a yard sign is a great way to show the world you’re proud to be bringing people together as part of Team Hillary -- plus, what better way start a conversation with your neighbors about what’s at stake in this campaign?

**Sign up for texts from Team Virginia! Your local organizers will be in touch to let you know when yard signs have arrived:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Hillary for Virginia

| ***Message & data rates apply; text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. ** | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY2NDYxNzkS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0Nzg2NDc0S0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185

With only 12 days until voting begins, you still have an opportunity to add your name to the community of people supporting Steve. | Supporter record: Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Supporter ID: 82084039 This is the information we have in our records. If you've donated with a different email address or written a check, thanks for your support _ | | Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P.O. Box 1330, Helena, MT 59624 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
Mr. Trump knows that we can only win this election if every single patriotic American steps up and joins the fight. |

Friend, Mr. Trump set a $20 million dollar goal for our FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we need your help to CRUSH it. Because this deadline is so important, he wanted to do something different... Contribute $35 and he’ll MATCH it. Contribute $50 and he’ll DOUBLE MATCH it. Contribute $75 or more and he’ll TRIPLE MATCH it. Friend, so if you contribute $100, Mr. Trump will add $300 of his own money into our campaign. Your contribution will have FOUR TIMES the impact at this pivotal moment in the presidential election. We’ll be able to knock on FOUR times the doors, run FOUR times the ads, and reach FOUR times the voters in battleground states that will swing the race. Mr. Trump knows that we can only win this election if every single patriotic American steps up and joins the fight. But he also wants to prove that he’s just as invested as you are. That’s why he’s willing to go so far as to TRIPLE MATCH your contribution today with a check from his pocket up to $2 million. This is your moment to officially etch your name into our movement with a contribution to Make America Great Again! Now make your best contribution today and he’ll TRIPLE MATCH it. Thanks, Brad Parscale Digital Director Donald J. Trump for President TRIPLE MATCH

name: Dan Coats
subject: My friend Eric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
In office, I have focused on cutting wasteful spending, reducing the national debt, and promoting a pro-growth economic policy to put Hoosiers and Ame | | | | | [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/4b0d6f1ac8a64802a3a77a35eb304ac3?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7558f1d1eff74f998fc991436b181327&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-1-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)
---
| | | | Friend, In office, I have focused on cutting wasteful spending, reducing the national debt, and promoting a pro-growth economic policy to put Hoosiers and Americans back to work. On a national level, we have not accomplished nearly as much as I would like, but I continue to be impressed by the progress and growth occurring in my home state of Indiana - **thanks in large part to having a leader like Lieutenant Governor Eric Holcomb.** From serving in the United States Navy to being a valued advisor of mine to becoming our Lieutenant Governor, Eric has truly been a leader for Indiana. He has been influential in helping the state grow and continue on the path to more jobs, more economic opportunity, and more prosperity for all Hoosier families. **Tomorrow, Eric is facing a tough deadline - the last major one of the election.** At the end of September, he has to close the books on his 3rd quarter fundraising numbers and release them to the public. **[It would mean a lot to me and it would mean even more to the Holcomb team if you could contribute $20 today to help my friend, and our next governor, Eric Holcomb, get past this deadline.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/0078b9e25d4d4a97a8674d1a2be3658a?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7558f1d1eff74f998fc991436b181327&amount=20&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-1-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)** **We need Eric to continue his commonsense, conservative legacy here in Indiana, and with your help we can do it.[Contribute to Team Holcomb today.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/beb47b1edae240558a3ab6426bf0eb4d?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7558f1d1eff74f998fc991436b181327&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-1-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)** Thank you,Senator Dan Coats

name: Barack Obama
subject: need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df1/738133e4/317924a5/7f854271/4055660737/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bo?refcode=pme160928bo_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")
---
| Hey,

I'm reaching out to you today because this is important. There's a lot at stake right now in Florida's Senate race.

We need Patrick Murphy to serve as Florida's next Senator. He stands up for what's right. He's a champion for middle-class families, women's health care, gun violence prevention, and for strengthening Medicare and Social Security. He's right on the issues, and he's right for Florida. [**Will you stand with me and contribute $10 before the End-of-Quarter deadline to help Patrick win?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df1/738133e4/317924a5/7f854271/4055660737/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bo?refcode=pme160928bo_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

Patrick shows up and works hard in Congress, and he will continue that fight in the U.S. Senate. It's why Republicans are spending so much money on attacks against him. They know he can win -- and help Democrats regain Senate leadership.

We need you on our side now more than ever. On Friday at midnight, Patrick's campaign has its last End-of-Quarter deadline before the election -- and he needs to meet his $200,000 goal. [**Will you chip in $10 to help Patrick win in Florida and turn the Senate blue?**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2df1/738133e4/317924a5/7f854271/4055660737/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160928bo?refcode=pme160928bo_m&recur_weekly=true&amount=10")

I count on Patrick Murphy. You can too, Friend.

Thank you,
Barack Obama

|

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd927/2a380d31/16cd7eee/fd1f52/4250798948/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Hey -- did you see this email featuring Senators Sanders, Warren, and Franken from earlier this week?
They're doing everything they can to ensure that we elect Maggie, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court, but they need your help.
**We're still short of our $100,000 fundraising goal, and the deadline is TOMORROW.[Can you help us get there by joining Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, and Al Franken and donating $3 or more directly to Maggie's campaign?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd927/2a380d31/16cd7eee/fd1f53/4250798948/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1XYXJyZW5raWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Hurry, time is running out and these progressive champions really need you in their corner.
Thanks for stepping up,
All of us here at Maggie's headquarters
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Wednesday, September 28 at 7:24 AM, Maggie for NH
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd927/2a380d31/16cd7eee/fd1f53/4250798948/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1XYXJyZW5raWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Al Franken are all going to bat to ensure that we elect Governor Hassan because they know that she is our best chance to win back a Democratic Senate and secure the future of the Supreme Court.
Recent polls show us LOSING to Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte, and hitting our $100,000 goal by Friday at midnight is our best chance to turn the numbers around. [**Please join Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Al Franken and donate $3 or more before tomorrow at midnight. Your gift will help us win in New Hampshire, take back the Senate, and secure the future of the Supreme Court.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd927/2a380d31/16cd7eee/fd1f53/4250798948/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1XYXJyZW5raWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd927/2a380d31/16cd7eee/fd1f53/4250798948/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1XYXJyZW5raWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Senators Sanders, Warren, and Franken aren't the only ones who know that Maggie will always put hard-working families first. Ayotte's corporate special interests know it too, so they've spent $40 MILLION and counting to keep their rubber stamp in office. We CAN'T let Ayotte and her friends like the Koch Brothers and Mitch McConnell buy this election.
**With the Supreme Court on the line and our biggest deadline of the campaign just days away, there has never been a better time to donate:**
[**Elizabeth Warren and Bernie Sanders need you with them, so please donate $3 or more now, before Friday's deadline, to make a real impact on our race that will almost certainly decide Senate control.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd927/2a380d31/16cd7eee/fd1f53/4250798948/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1XYXJyZW5raWNrX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Warrenkick_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks,
Team Maggie

name: NHGOP
subject: Even a few hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Friend,

With only 40 days left until Election Day, this weekend is
another critical day of action for the NHGOP. Can you spend even
a few hours going door to door on behalf of our GOP ticket? Click
here to get involved and join us at National Weekend of Action.
Please forward this along to your family, friends, and neighbors!

WHAT: National Weekend of Action

WHEN: This Saturday and Sunday - October 1st and 2nd

clean_body: Friend, With only 40 days left until Election Day, this weekend is another critical day of action for the NHGOP. Can you spend even a few hours going door to door on behalf of our GOP ticket? Click here to get involved and join us at National Weekend of Action. Please forward this along to your family, friends, and neighbors! WHAT: National Weekend of Action WHEN: This Saturday and Sunday - October 1st and 2nd WHERE: Over 40 locations across New Hampshire. Click here for the full list. ( ) CLICK HERE TO GET INVOLVED! ( ) NHGOP Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.nh.gop ( ) footer image

name: Katie McGinty
subject: tomorrow’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
Friends --

Tomorrow is a big day. After over a year of hard work, we've got barely **24 hours** until we hit the final FEC quarterly deadline of our campaign.

**Here 's the problem:** My team tells me that we're still **$16,483** short of our FEC fundraising goal right now -- and with just 40 short days until the election, we can't afford to miss this goal.

[**Can you chip in? Contribute before the deadline to make sure we can keep fighting hard and strong for working families.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5480857515031789568/116274454148939776?refcode=e20160929.3&refcode2=e20160929.3nd&amount=25)

**[Quick, donate now-> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5480857515031789568/116274454148939776?refcode=e20160929.3&refcode2=e20160929.3nd&amount=25)**
Look, Pat Toomey stands for big banks and special interests. We've seen his voting record, and it isn't pretty:

* Voting (repeatedly) to defend the tax loopholes that encourage companies to ship American jobs overseas

* Voting to undermine the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau -- exposing everyday Americans to more abusive, predatory banking practices

* Voting to block common-sense gun safety laws that would protect our families and make our communities safer

These aren't votes for progress, and they certainly aren't votes for working families. These are clear attempts to line the pockets of big business at the expense of everyday Pennsylvanians -- and it has to stop.

[**So, let 's give it our all. Pitch in before midnight tomorrow to help us reach our goal and stay fighting strong until the very end >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5480857515031789568/116274454148939776?refcode=e20160929.3&refcode2=e20160929.3nd&amount=25)

[**www.katiemcginty.com/quarter-deadline**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5480857515031789568/116274454148939776?refcode=e20160929.3&refcode2=e20160929.3nd&amount=25)

We're fighting for Pennsylvania --

Katie McGinty
---
| *** A note on donations ***

Katie is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. We're relying on grassroots donations from people like you to win this race and take back the Senate.
**Chip in $5 today. Thank you.**

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5480857515031789568/116274454148939776?refcode=e20160929.3&refcode2=e20160929.3nd&amount=25)**
---
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-5480857515031789568/44216860111011840).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Ben Ray
subject: "I'll stand with Hoosiers"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W
body:
| [ ](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504ec/7be36b49/1eac70df/78f85251/606987339/VEsH/ "http://www.evanbayhforindiana.com/")
---
**" While the extremes of both parties will fight, I'll stand with Hoosiers."
\-- Evan Bayh ** [](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504ec/7be36b49/1eac70df/78f85250/606987339/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160929nd&amount=10") Friend -- Dark money forces are determined to keep Evan out of the Senate. They know he'll be an independent voice who puts Hoosier interests first, not a rubber stamp for the Koch brothers' reactionary agenda.

**_So we have to be even more determined to get him elected._**

That's what makes our end-of-quarter goal so important. It'll allow us to fund the infrastructure and tools that will make the difference in this "toss-up" race. **[Will you pitch in $5 today and get your gift matched?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504ec/7be36b49/1eac70df/78f85250/606987339/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160929nd&amount=10")**

Unlike his opponent, Evan supports a strong Social Security and Medicare. He's against any new trade agreements until we start enforcing the ones already on the books. And he's proud of his vote for the 2008 auto industry rescue that saved 100,000 Hoosier jobs.

No wonder the special interests are lined up against him to the tune of millions of dollars.

**But this is our state, Friend. And we 're not going to give it up.**

**[Will you pitch in $5 now to elect Evan Bayh, the candidate Hoosiers trust to put Indiana first? Your gift will be matched.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504ec/7be36b49/1eac70df/78f85250/606987339/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160929nd&amount=10")**

Thanks,

Ben Ray
Communications Director, Evan Bayh for Indiana
******[Contribute](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a504ec/7be36b49/1eac70df/78f85257/606987339/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-septeoq?refcode=20160929nd&amount=25")****** **** **** **** ****
Paid for by the Evan Bayh Committee, 133 W. Market Street #153, Indianapolis, IN 46204

dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Al Franken
subject: this isn't one of "those emails"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Donald Trump in the White House is a scary thought. But if you're worried, why not do something about it? And you don't even have to wait until Election Day...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- If you think President Donald Trump is the worst case scenario, think again. After all, the only thing Trump needs to spout lies and bigotry is a microphone.

But with a Republican Senate, he can demolish health care reform, write discrimination into law, and pack the Supreme Court with, well, the kind of people Donald Trump would nominate to the Supreme Court.

Scary stuff. But this isn't one of those emails about how you should PANIC and how THINGS ARE FALLING APART and how DONALD TRUMP IS OUTSIDE YOUR HOUSE RIGHT NOW WITH A CHAINSAW.

No, this is about how you can turn your anxiety into action.

[**Just click here (before tomorrow 's FEC deadline) to make a triple-matched gift that will help Democrats stop Trump and take back the Senate!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

President Obama says, "Don't boo, vote." Well, I have a saying of my own: "Don't freak, click."

Mine isn't as clever. But my point is: If you're worried, _why not do something about it?_

After all, I know you're going to vote to stop Trump on November 8. But supporting the DSCC lets you impact races across the country that will decide whether Democrats win the Senate or whether Republicans can bring Trump's agenda to life.

And you don't even have to wait for Election Day. **In fact, the sooner you give, the more your contribution will help -- and the better you 'll feel.**

**Ready to breathe a little easier, Friend? Pitch in a triple-matched gift by tomorrow 's end-of-quarter deadline: **

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

name: Team Inslee
subject: FWD: Can we bank on it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
****What can we take to the bank? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, Did you see Tracy's email yesterday? I'm forwarding it in case you missed it. We're looking at all our options for the next five weeks. That includes buying airtime for our ads -- in the face of our opponent's access to big-money friends. Tracy and the team know $25,000 is needed by midnight tomorrow if we're going to make it happen -- and right now we're $11,838 behind our goal. [**Can you make a donation now, so we can move forward with an impactful, strategic advertising buy?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you for stepping up. Team Inslee \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tracy Newman
Date: Wednesday, September 28, 2016
Subject: Can we bank on it?
Friend, here's the deal. Soon, I need to give the go-ahead to the bank to transfer funds to get our television ads on the air. Or not. With all the other demands on our resources as we head into the last five weeks, it will all depend on the success of the most important fundraising deadline of our campaign. I can tell you already it's going to be a tough call. Aisling and Diane and the team are running a powerful and effective ground game. Jay will win on Election Day because of their Get Out the Vote efforts. We can't shortchange them. But it makes me really nervous when I remember how Republican Bill Bryant barraged us with ads in the last two weeks of the primary -- thanks to his deep-pocketed buddies. It wasn't pretty -- and those type of big-money-funded ads aren't how our democracy should work. Republican Bill Bryant has wealthy friends willing to pour tens of thousands of dollars into a last-minute ad blitz -- including one of Trump's biggest backers. We have you. **That 's why I'm asking if you can help us raise $25,000 by Friday -- our public end-of-month deadline.** If we make it, we can have our winning ground game AND television ads on the air. [**Can you help out?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&rt=0)**
Thanks for pitching in,
Tracy
Finance Director
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTU5OTU0OQS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjMyNzI1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Senator Al Franken
subject: Control of the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fa6/24c69fd9/162e81e4/18e865ff/2322904168/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all&source=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all")
---

| | Hi there,

Most of the races to flip control of the Senate are going to be tight, and I know a thing or two about tight races.

My 2008 Senate race went to a recount, and we won by just 312 votes out of nearly three million.

We have a good chance to put the Senate back in Democratic control, but we need to win in states like Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina -- all of which are toss-ups right now. Control of the Senate hinges on these races -- and their EMILY's List-backed candidates.

After seven years of working in Congress, I wouldn't bet against you (and I'm pretty sure Franni would throw me out of the house if I tried).

But here's the thing: EMILY's List has a big End-of-Quarter goal -- $300,000 big -- and every bit that EMILY's List raises toward that goal will help their candidates win.

**[Donate $5 or more to help hit the EMILY's List End-of-Quarter goal-- they told me you'll get a free Turn the Senate Blue sticker when you do.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fa6/24c69fd9/162e81e4/18e865f8/2322904168/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160925_email_EOQSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+5+or+more+to+help+hit+the+EMILYs+&utm_campaign=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all&source=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all")**

It's no secret that I think Hillary Clinton is exactly who we need to lead our country next. And I'd sure like to have Catherine Cortez Masto, Tammy Duckworth, Kamala Harris, Maggie Hassan, Ann Kirkpatrick, Katie McGinty, and Deborah Ross as new colleagues come January. The alternative just isn't going to cut it.

That's why EMILY's List needs us all to chip in to help hit the End-of-Quarter goal. It's not just the end of any old quarter, it's the last fundraising quarter before Election Day. This is the last chance to help these women running in close, close races get the resources they need to win.

EMILY's List is doing terrific work to get these Democratic women elected, but we all know that no race is won alone. If any of these races come down to a couple hundred votes, you want to have the EMILY's List team backing you up.

**Help hit their End-of-Quarter goal so you can do what you do best -- elect more Democratic women in 2016:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/EOQ-Senate](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fa6/24c69fd9/162e81e4/18e865f9/2322904168/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160925_email_EOQSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgEOQSenate&utm_campaign=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all&source=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all")**

Thanks for your help,

Senator Al Franken

P.S.: I wasn't kidding about the stickers -- **[donate $5 or more to EMILY's List today, and they'll drop a Turn the Senate Blue sticker right in the mail.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fa6/24c69fd9/162e81e4/18e865fa/2322904168/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160925_email_EOQSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+donate+5+or+more+to+EMILYs+List+today+an&utm_campaign=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all&source=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all")**

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0fa6/24c69fd9/162e81e4/18e865fb/2322904168/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160925_email_EOQSenate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all&source=WPEFEU63N_digital_email_20160929_Franken_nn-all")

|
---|---|---
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|

Remember to get your tickets to join Governor Mike Pence and team in **York, PA, Today, Thursday, Sept. 29th @ 2****:30 PM** for a rally! [Get your tickets here.](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fyork-pa%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pa_yor_92916vt&n=2 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/york-pa/") Details about the event are below:

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Stand Up to Donald's Hypocrisy on Family Leave
body:
Stand Up to Donald's Hypocrisy on Family Leave | | | |
---|---
| | Dear Activist,

Donald Trump has recently released a maternity leave plan as part of his cynical rebranding. But Democrats know the truth – that these are empty words from a man who once called pregnant employees "an inconvenience."

And while Donald and Senate Republicans have been insulting women and busy families, Democrats have been fighting for paid family leave for years.

It's time to get serious about paid family leave in America. [Add your name and help the Senate Democrats stand up for paid family leave in Congress](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/6cPix/6/6p/r5cs/6FcM2s/1mZqmuxFL "Link: https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/paid-leave?source=SEM_demsdotcom_PaidLeave").

Right now in America, working parents have to choose between keeping their job and caring for their children. But in the wealthiest country in the world, they shouldn't have to make that choice.

It's time that we fight back against Senate Republicans' obstructionism once and for all.

This year you can make a difference. [Sign this petition to show Republicans that paid family leave is an important issue for you this election](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/6cPix/s/6p/r5cs/6FcM2s/vtNVFM51v7).

Thanks for all you do!

Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
|
---|---
---

name: Tim Kaine
subject: re: these final six weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
She fought her heart out | | Derek --

I was proud to watch Hillary take on Donald Trump on that debate stage Monday night.

She fought her heart out for every single American, and now, I'm hoping we can show how hard we’re fighting for her in these final six weeks.

Tomorrow is the last major FEC fundraising deadline for our campaign. If we don't hit our goals and show the strongest possible result we can possibly achieve, the media will have a new story to write -- how Trump's team is rallying behind him and how Hillary's team is lagging behind.

If that happens, all the momentum that Hillary built for us on Monday night could fizzle out.

So, Derek -- let’s meet our goals, keep the critics at bay, and ensure we have the resources we need to win this fight.

We have a goal of 2.5 million donors by tomorrow. 19 people have already contributed from your area, and that means we only need 7 more people to step up today. **Chip in before the deadline to help us keep the momentum that Hillary built in the debate, and ensure we have the resources we need to win on November 8th -- we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY2NTEzMjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0ODg2NTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Every single day, people ask me what the best part of this campaign is, and my answer is always the same: this team -- you always come through when we need you most, and we need you right now. I know you won't let us down.

Thank you,

Tim

|

clean_body: She fought her heart out | | Derek -- I was proud to watch Hillary take on Donald Trump on that debate stage Monday night. She fought her heart out for every single American, and now, I'm hoping we can show how hard we’re fighting for her in these final six weeks. Tomorrow is the last major FEC fundraising deadline for our campaign. If we don't hit our goals and show the strongest possible result we can possibly achieve, the media will have a new story to write -- how Trump's team is rallying behind him and how Hillary's team is lagging behind. If that happens, all the momentum that Hillary built for us on Monday night could fizzle out. So, Derek -- let’s meet our goals, keep the critics at bay, and ensure we have the resources we need to win this fight. We have a goal of 2.5 million donors by tomorrow. 19 people have already contributed from your area, and that means we only need 7 more people to step up today. Chip in before the deadline to help us keep the momentum that Hillary built in the debate, and ensure we have the resources we need to win on November 8th -- we’ll send you a free sticker to say thank you: Every single day, people ask me what the best part of this campaign is, and my answer is always the same: this team -- you always come through when we need you most, and we need you right now. I know you won't let us down. Thank you, Tim | Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month: | to send us a message! name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump=2C=20Jr=2E=20?=
subject: We can do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Our country is at stake. And now we need your help. |

Friend, When someone tells my father something is impossible, that’s when you know he’ll get it done. That’s how we won the Republican primary -- and it’s how we’ll win the White House just 40 days from now. He’s also set a $2O million goal by September 30th at 11:59 PM to ensure we have the resources to win. I know it sounds impossible, but together we can get it done. To get us started, my father is writing a $2 MILLION MATCHING CHECK. Please contribute whatever you can before the FEC deadline to get your contribution matched. CONTRIBUTE $100 >> $200 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $65 >> $130 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $50 >> $100 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE $35 >> $70 WITH MATCH CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT After Monday night’s debate, the stakes for the White House have never been higher. Hillary’s donors will go into overdrive to pour money into her failing campaign. But we have something far more powerful... YOU. We have the passion and enthusiasm of the American people on our side. The people who are fed up with D.C.’s corruption greatly outnumber the Washington insiders bankrolling Hillary’s campaign. And that’s why it’s so important for each and every American who’s sick and tired of our rigged political system to step up and make a contribution right now. Contribute any amount you can before our FINAL FEC-mandated end-of-quarter deadline, and my father will MATCH it up to $2 million. Thanks, Donald J. Trump, Jr. CONTRIBUTE $100 >> $200 WITH MATCH

body:

Friend, as Chris's campaign manager it's my job to make sure that our message is reaching Maryland voters across the state from Western Maryland to the Eastern Shore, and every county and city in between. People have busy lives and, as we know, sadly not everyone takes the time to go to the polls to exercise their right to vote.

But its our job to make sure they do. And our team has been working hard at that.

Still, with everything at stake in this critical election year, Maryland polls still show that not everyone is engaged -- 19 percent of registered voters are still undecided in this Senate election!

We need to do better than that. And with your help I know we can. On Friday our campaign will face our last quarterly FEC deadline of this election cycle. The numbers we post will show our opponent, the media, and our critics how strong we are. They will also determine the resources we have for our final GOTV push across Maryland. **[Will you chip in to help before this critical deadline?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ad2/70cdc2ba/4718d291/397522d/3493191461/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092816_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+before+this+cri&utm_campaign=em092916_1&source=em092916_1")**

name: Bill Cole
subject: Is West Virginia important to you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| |
---
| Friend -- In less than 40 days, voters across West Virginia will head to the polls to elect our next governor. And on November 8th, I hope to earn your vote. This is the most important election for our state in recent memory, and the choice is clear. Elect Jim Justice, and West Virginia will be under the leadership of a man with questionable business ethics and lack of transparency: **He even refuses to say who he will support for President.** In my experience, if someone isn’t willing to publicly comment on who they will be casting their ballot for, it’s a sure fire way to tell that they know their choice is wildly unpopular. In this case, it’s more than fair to say that Jim Justice is going to cast his ballot for Hillary Clinton. **This is what I'm asking:** Please stand with me as I work to grow West Virginia’s economy, and create the infrastructure necessary to ensure that **_every_** West Virginia family has the opportunity to live the American dream. **[Donate right now--->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=1 "Donate
Today")** Help me send a message to the entire state: We’re not going back to the ways of old.**[Contribute to my campaign today to help me continue to spread my message!](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=2 "Donate Today")** We have little time left to make our case, so please **[consider making a contribution today!](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=3 "Chip In Now! ")** I must be able to keep my ads on the air and reach voters all across West Virginia. **[Donate to my campaign today \---->

](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=4 "Donate Today")**I want to show Jim Justice we have the support of grassroots voters in West Virginia! **[Donate $50-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=5 "Donate Today")** **[Donate $150-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=6 "Donate Today")** **[Donate $250-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=7 "Donate Today")** **[Donate $1,000-->](https://billcole.nationbuilder.com/donate_september_deadline?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=9_29&n=8 "Donate Today")** For West Virginia, Bill Cole

**End-Of-Quarter Goal: $100,000**
**Deadline: TOMORROW**
[**Donate to take back the Senate**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93e/2a380d31/16cca7e9/fd1bda/1152885164/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1OdW1iZXJzX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Numbers_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
We spend all day looking at all kinds of numbers -- polls, fundraising goals, donor records... you name it. But right now, these are the numbers that you need to know in this race to elect Governor Hassan, take back the Senate, and secure the Supreme Court.
* **Three recent polls** show Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte with a slight lead
* Corporate special interests have spent **$40 MILLION and counting** to stop Maggie from winning
* We have a **$100,000 goal** for the final FEC end-of-quarter fundraising deadline...
* ...and it's only **1 day away!**

With polls showing us a few points behind and the Senate majority and the future of the Supreme Court at stake, we can't afford to miss _any_ fundraising benchmarks. **[Donate $3 or more today to help Maggie hit this $100,000 goal, swing the polls, win this race, and make the best interests of hard-working families the #1 priority in the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd93e/2a380d31/16cca7e9/fd1bda/1152885164/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwOTI5X0VPUS1OdW1iZXJzX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160929_EOQ-Numbers_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
-- Team Maggie

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I am personally asking you to step up, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
It could happen. | | Derek, I have one thought on my mind these days every morning when I wake up and every night before I eventually go to sleep:

What if we lose?

Because the truth is, right now, we’re simply not doing everything we could be doing. I know some folks have gotten complacent in their belief that Donald Trump couldn’t possibly win -- even though there's plenty of evidence that shows this race is tied.

I think that complacency is how we’ve ended up very far from our September fundraising goal with fewer than 36 hours to go.

**Derek, I am personally asking you to step up and help today, or we will end September far from our goal of 2.5 million grassroots donors. Can you chip in right now? We’ll send you a free sticker.** | **You’re one of our most committed supporters. If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately:
** | **[**Derek, donate now: $1**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY2NTU0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTIzMTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0) **
---
**[**Derek, donate now: $5**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjY2NTU0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTIzMTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $10**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY2NTU0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTIzMTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $25**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY2NTU0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTIzMTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**[**Derek, donate now: $50**](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjY2NTU0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTIzMTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
**

If we don’t get closer to our goal by tomorrow at midnight, we’re putting ourselves at risk of not being able to open our final round of field offices, hire our final round of organizers, or air our final round of ads to convince voters in key battleground states.

I don’t want to wake up on November 9th knowing we could have done more -- or worse, knowing we would have done more if we’d only had the resources we needed.

**So here I am, asking for your help. If 13 people from your area step up today, we’ll be in a much better place heading into the final day of the quarter tomorrow. Can you chip in $1 right now? This country is counting on us, and so is Hillary:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY2NTU0ODAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTIzMTY5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and help us reach our goal of 2.5 million individual grassroots donors by the end of the month:**
| [

---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---

This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. name: =?UTF-8?Q?donaldjtrump=2Ecom?=
subject: Trump is writing TRIPLE MATCH checks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Mr. Trump knows that we can only win this election if every single patriotic American steps up and joins the fight. |

Friend, Mr. Trump set a $20 million dollar goal for our FINAL end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and we need your help to CRUSH it. Because this deadline is so important, he wanted to do something different... Contribute $35 and he’ll MATCH it. Contribute $50 and he’ll DOUBLE MATCH it. Contribute $75 or more and he’ll TRIPLE MATCH it. Friend, so if you contribute $100, Mr. Trump will add $300 of his own money into our campaign. Your contribution will have FOUR TIMES the impact at this pivotal moment in the presidential election. We’ll be able to knock on FOUR times the doors, run FOUR times the ads, and reach FOUR times the voters in battleground states that will swing the race. Mr. Trump knows that we can only win this election if every single patriotic American steps up and joins the fight. But he also wants to prove that he’s just as invested as you are. That’s why he’s willing to go so far as to TRIPLE MATCH your contribution today with a check from his pocket up to $2 million. This is your moment to officially etch your name into our movement with a contribution to Make America Great Again! Now make your best contribution today and he’ll TRIPLE MATCH it. Thanks, Brad Parscale Digital Director Donald J. Trump for President TRIPLE MATCH

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

**" I feel better about it today than I have in months"**
_- Paul Ryan yesterday on GOP's chances to keep the Senate_

Listen -- Paul Ryan is crowing about how certain he is Republicans will keep the Senate AND the House in November.

He's assuming Pat Toomey will hold his Pennsylvania seat -- but with your help **we 're going to prove him wrong.**

Team Katie

Hello,

Let me tell you what we're up against:

Our opponent has received more than $10 million from out-of-state donors. This is the most out-of-state campaign cash ever spent on a single race in Missouri. _**And last month, Eric Greitens raised more than twice as much as we did.**_

We can't let that happen again this month.

Eric Greitens is funding his campaign with massive donations from mysterious billionaires and special interest groups. We need the support of working families across the state to help us fight back.

name: Official Van Hollen Campaign
subject: following up for Chris
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Did you see Chris' email from earlier this week? Chris is counting on us. We can't take anything for granted -- after all, just two years ago Maryland elected a Republican Governor.

**[Please chip in now to ensure we keep this seat Blue and send Chris Van Hollen to the U.S. Senate in November.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ade/70cdc2ba/47276368/39750d0/1097064534/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092916_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+chip+in+now+to+ensure+we+keep+thi&utm_campaign=em092916_2&source=em092916_2")**

_Begin Forwarded Message:_
>
>
> Friend, I have always believed that progress springs from the grassroots up -- not the top down. Real change comes when people band together to demand it. That's been the history of the women's movement, the civil rights movement, the labor movement, the movement for LGBTQ rights and many more.
>
> This 2016 election is an historic moment. Here in Maryland and across our country, we have an opportunity to send a strong and unequivocal message that we choose hope over fear; and unity over division. We must elect Hillary Clinton as president and reject the politics of fear, hate and intolerance being spread by Donald Trump.
>
> During my time in public service, I've worked together with many of you to expand economic and educational opportunities, improve health care, protect our environment, and fight for civil rights in order to build a more perfect union. Whatever the issue -- from generating more good paying jobs, to adopting common sense gun safety measures, to stopping efforts to roll back a woman's right to choose -- the future will be affected by the outcome of this election.
>
> I'm very proud to have supporters like you standing with me. We have come a long way and our goal is almost in sight.
>
> **September 30th is the next significant milestone for our campaign.**
>
> It's the last quarterly FEC deadline before Election Day -- and our last opportunity to show our opponent's SuperPAC friends that we have the strength and resources to face whatever they may throw at us in the final intense weeks of this campaign.
>
> [**Thank you for anything you are able to do to help us meet this latest milestone. Any support received by midnight September 30 will help us deter the SuperPAC vultures who are watching.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ade/70cdc2ba/47276368/39750d1/1097064534/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em092916_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Thank+you+for+anything+you+are+able+to+d&utm_campaign=em092916_2&source=em092916_2")
>
> Our common goal could not be more important -- that on November 9th our state and our country will be ready to move forward to tackle the challenges ahead rather than be dragged backwards.
>
> Thank you for all you do!
>
> Chris
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91ade/70cdc2ba/47276368/39750ee/1097064534/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em092916_2&source=em092916_2") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: RACE UPDATE (via DSCC)
subject: projections (Rachel Maddow)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Taking back the majority depends on what grassroots Democrats do before the most important FEC deadline of this election. Please pitch in today...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
_**SENATE PROJECTIONS DISAGREE (RACHEL MADDOW)**_
**[It's up to you, Friend! QUADRUPLE your support today >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

---
Friend, our battle for the Senate majority is so tight that experts can't agree who will win:

★ The _New York Times_ thinks **REPUBLICANS** have a 58% chance
★ Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_ team thinks **DEMOCRATS** have a 61% chance
★ And the _Washington Post_ has **REPUBLICANS** as slight favorites
So who's _actually_ going to win? That depends on what grassroots Democrats like you do before the most important FEC deadline of this election. [**Will you pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift today to push our candidates ahead, hit our quarterly goal, and take back the majority?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Hitting this goal is a BIG DEAL. It shows those experts (and the GOP) that we're ready to FIGHT and WIN in the final stretch. **But right now, we 're $426,789 short.**

And while we're behind, Republican special interests are ramping up their spending in key battlegrounds. If we want to overcome their dark money (and we do!), it's now or never.

**Friend, can you rush an end-of-quarter gift to help us reach our goal? It 'll be instantly QUADRUPLED and help Democrats come out on top.**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4w?refcode=DPE-20160929-RaceUpdateDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f638/2b07114c/7d9c0b43/73813c92/2250338987/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f638/2b07114c/7d9c0b43/73813c8d/2250338987/VEsHAg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate in November, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954f638/2b07114c/7d9c0b43/73813c8c/2250338987/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

---

| | Hi there,

I'm so incredibly proud to see how many members of this community are stepping up to help hit our fundraising goals this cycle.

We've been setting records left and right. We raised more money in August than in any other month in our entire 31-year history -- that's 380 months. And we're on track to have another record End-of-Quarter this month.

**[Ready to help shatter another fundraising record? Donate $3 before midnight tomorrow to break through our critical $300,000 End-of-Quarter goal.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0f87/24c69fd9/168e97a2/18e818fb/500130687/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160926_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Ready+to+help+shatter+another+fundraisin&utm_campaign=WPEFEU66N_digital_email_20160929_Shattered_n-all&source=WPEFEU66N_digital_email_20160929_Shattered_n-all")**

It's a good thing so many people are pitching in, because we have more work to do this cycle than ever before.

Never before has EMILY's List helped elect a president. We're going to make history AND defeat one of the most anti-woman candidates we've ever seen.

We're supporting a record number of new women for the Senate -- eight! -- and Democrats can't flip the Senate without them. We've also got to start cleaning up the House, including flipping 21 seats from red to blue. And we have to make sure we're electing women at the state and local level to protect choice and build a pipeline for the future.

It's a lot! Hitting our fundraising goals won't be enough. To shatter glass ceilings in November, we need to shatter all of our fundraising goals too.

We're off to a strong start, and I know this community is more than capable of hitting our final End-of-Quarter goal for this election.

**Donate $3 to help hit our $300,000 End-of-Quarter goal and be a part of the group that's making history:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/EOQ-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0f87/24c69fd9/168e97a2/18e818f4/500130687/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160926_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgEOQGoal&utm_campaign=WPEFEU66N_digital_email_20160929_Shattered_n-all&source=WPEFEU66N_digital_email_20160929_Shattered_n-all")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0f87/24c69fd9/168e97a2/18e818f5/500130687/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20160926_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFEU66N_digital_email_20160929_Shattered_n-all&source=WPEFEU66N_digital_email_20160929_Shattered_n-all")

|
---|---|---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Mike_O=E2=80=99Brien?=
subject: Fwd: My friend Eric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Senator Coats emailed you earlier today, and I wanted to make sure you got the chance to hear what he has to say about Eric and what he’s done for Ind | | | | | Friend, Senator Coats emailed you earlier today, and I wanted to make sure you got the chance to hear what he has to say about Eric and what he's done for Indiana. With our quarterly deadline coming up at midnight tomorrow, this is the perfect opportunity to fight back against those who seek to undo all the progress we've made together. **We 're aiming to raise $50,000 by the end of September to stock our campaign with the tools necessary to defend our record against their baseless attacks in the last months of the election.** **[Will you help us fight back against John Gregg and his liberal allies by contributing $20 to elect Eric today?](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/77ee67e8bc754f749e71bd29caeb9dd5?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7c28981fea3842a0bdb54372fef4ff09&amount=20&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_header_amount&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-2-fwd-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)** Thank you,Mike O'Brien On Sep, Sep 29, 2016 at 10:00 AM, Dan Coats <[communications@holcombforindiana.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/3569f87a120f421688709ef8842f418a?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7c28981fea3842a0bdb54372fef4ff09&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_header_email&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-2-fwd-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)>
---
|
---
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/e6b49682ee9247918ebc0be144473fc1?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7c28981fea3842a0bdb54372fef4ff09&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-2-fwd-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)
---
|
---
| | | | Friend, In office, I have focused on cutting wasteful spending, reducing the national debt, and promoting a pro-growth economic policy to put Hoosiers and Americans back to work. On a national level, we have not accomplished nearly as much as I would like, but I continue to be impressed by the progress and growth occurring in my home state of Indiana - **thanks in large part to having a leader like Lieutenant Governor Eric Holcomb.** From serving in the United States Navy to being a valued advisor of mine to becoming our Lieutenant Governor, Eric has truly been a leader for Indiana. He has been influential in helping the state grow and continue on the path to more jobs, more economic opportunity, and more prosperity for all Hoosier families. **Tomorrow, Eric is facing a tough deadline - the last major one of the election.** At the end of September, he has to close the books on his 3rd quarter fundraising numbers and release them to the public. **[It would mean a lot to me and it would mean even more to the Holcomb team if you could contribute $20 today to help my friend, and our next governor, Eric Holcomb, get past this deadline.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/c189194ed7cd46a4a933f1083e98c759?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7c28981fea3842a0bdb54372fef4ff09&amount=20&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-2-fwd-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)**
**We need Eric to continue his commonsense, conservative legacy here in Indiana, and with your help we can do it.[Contribute to Team Holcomb today.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/97a9b00373124649ada0a1776762cdb5?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7c28981fea3842a0bdb54372fef4ff09&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-2-fwd-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)** Thank you,Senator Dan Coats
---
| | [ **** Contribute ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/03d09a82fff1481e99d7fdccc4b11b25?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&_m=7c28981fea3842a0bdb54372fef4ff09&utm_source=Iterable&utm_medium=button_footer_text&utm_term=Fundraising_Deadline&utm_campaign=EOM&utm_content=20160929-2-fwd-my-friend-eric-16266-direct)
