name: Donna Edwards
subject: A true progressive champion needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
body:
Dear Friend,
I want to tell you about one of the most important house races in the country. My friend, Carol Shea-Porter, a true progressive champion, is running in New Hampshire against one of the most corrupt Members of Congress, and she needs your help to defeat him.
Here's the story, and stop me if it sounds familiar: Her opponent is funded by the usual suspects in Republican politics -- billionaires, big oil, and multinational financial institutions.
Meanwhile, Carol co-sponsored legislation for campaign finance reform and supports a Constitutional Amendment to get stop the awful effects of Citizens united.
[**Her campaign relies on grassroots power; she doesn 't accept corporate PAC or DC lobbyist donations. That's why she needs you. Please chip in $5 to her campaign to show that the people can defeat the billionaires and corporate interests trying to stop her.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff47/767134fb/5c3f25e5/4338179a/1816357713/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaandcarol?source=DFE20160929")
Carol is running against Congressman Frank Guinta. You may have heard of him. He's the one that accepted $355,000 in illegal campaign contributions and then lied for five years about being under investigation, going so far as to run ads calling Carol the liar.
Every paper in New Hampshire called for his resignation. And the most conservative one, the NH Union Leader, ran a six-word editorial that simply said, "Frank Guinta is a damned liar."
I've known Carol for a long time, and she's always stood up for workers and families, women, seniors, minorities, small businesses, and all others who need an advocate in Congress. She's worked tirelessly to pass equal pay for equal work, raise the minimum wage, and defend against Republican attempts to defund Planned Parenthood. She believes in science and fights climate change. She knows education is the key to prosperity and that it must be affordable.
**To sum it up, she shares our progressive values.** As Carol has always said, we need people in Congress who will stand up for "the rest of us," and that's why I'm asking you to stand with Carol as she continues her fight to take this seat back from one of the most far right tea partiers in Congress.
[**Can you chip in $5, or whatever you can, to help elect Carol to Congress? She needs us now. And if she wins we can send a big message about the power of people over big money.**](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff47/767134fb/5c3f25e5/4338179a/1816357713/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/donnaandcarol?source=DFE20160929")
Thank you,
Donna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you would like to receive less email, please [click here](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff47/767134fb/5c3f25e5/4338179b/1816357713/VEsF/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/s/receive-less-email"). Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/m/74feff47/767134fb/5c3f25e5/43381798/1816357713/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.donnaedwardsforsenate.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Donna Edwards for Senate
Donna Edwards for Senate
P.O Box 44305
Ft. Washington, MD 20749

************
********************

name: Jay Inslee
subject: How low will he go?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We can't let my opponent get away with lying. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTYwNjk3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, It's clear what we can expect from these final 40 days of the campaign. More desperate attacks from my opponent. More last-ditch attack ads funded by millionaire-class Republican donors and special interests. I promise to offer something different: A positive vision for our state on the most critical issues of our time, including economic growth, education, and climate change. But Republican Bill Bryant isn't going to back down -- not for a second. And, if he keeps following the Republican playbook, that means he'll start hitting me with relentless attack ads. **We need to be prepared to get television ads up and running to fight the attacks with our positive vision -- it's how we win this campaign the right way. Will you make an immediate contribution to help us meet our official goal of $25,000 by midnight tomorrow?** _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=OTYwNjk3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTYwNjk3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=OTYwNjk3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=OTYwNjk3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=OTYwNjk3MwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&mt=2&rj=MTAwMjQwMTY2MwS2&rt=0)**
We cannot allow my opponent's attacks to go unanswered. He will say anything and do anything to win, no matter the cost.
Can I count on you to help us fight back?

Jay Inslee

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: This story broke early this morning:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
It just keeps getting worse | | Derek --

If you thought you knew the worst of how Donald Trump treats women, hold on tight for the story that broke this morning:

According to sworn statements from managers at Trump’s golf course in California, Trump pressured his team to hire young, thin women -- not experienced ones -- to work in the restaurant and clubhouse. When he would come in and see women he didn’t find attractive enough, he would tell the managers to fire them.

I am so sick and tired of pretending this guy is a legitimate option to be our president. He's just some guy who parlayed his father’s success into gaudy magazine spreads and a reality show. And we’re supposed to treat him like he’s worthy of consideration for the toughest job in America?

He’s not. The Republican Party should be ashamed of itself for nominating him.

But right now, _FiveThirtyEight_ has Trump winning Ohio, Florida, Nevada, Iowa, and North Carolina. Which means that instead of electing our first woman president -- and maybe the most qualified candidate in history -- this unrepentant misogynist could be our next Commander-in-Chief.

It’s up to us to stop him. Our final quarterly deadline of this campaign is tomorrow, and we’re way behind our goal of 2.5 million grassroots donors. So we need you to step up for the first time -- we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you. **Chip in $1 to support Women for Hillary to help reach women voters in key states, and let’s show Trump how it feels to lose to some of the smartest, toughest women around: this team.** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY2NTc3NzAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODg0OTY4MzM0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Mini

Mini Timmaraju
National Women's Vote Director
Hillary for America

|
**Official 2016 Supporter Record

Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Status: Pending
Last Contribution Date: N/A
Suggested Contribution: $1**
| [

clean_body: It just keeps getting worse | | Derek -- If you thought you knew the worst of how Donald Trump treats women, hold on tight for the story that broke this morning: According to sworn statements from managers at Trump’s golf course in California, Trump pressured his team to hire young, thin women -- not experienced ones -- to work in the restaurant and clubhouse. When he would come in and see women he didn’t find attractive enough, he would tell the managers to fire them. I am so sick and tired of pretending this guy is a legitimate option to be our president. He's just some guy who parlayed his father’s success into gaudy magazine spreads and a reality show. And we’re supposed to treat him like he’s worthy of consideration for the toughest job in America? He’s not. The Republican Party should be ashamed of itself for nominating him. But right now, FiveThirtyEight has Trump winning Ohio, Florida, Nevada, Iowa, and North Carolina. Which means that instead of electing our first woman president -- and maybe the most qualified candidate in history -- this unrepentant misogynist could be our next Commander-in-Chief. It’s up to us to stop him. Our final quarterly deadline of this campaign is tomorrow, and we’re way behind our goal of 2.5 million grassroots donors. So we need you to step up for the first time -- we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you. Chip in $1 to support Women for Hillary to help reach women voters in key states, and let’s show Trump how it feels to lose to some of the smartest, toughest women around: this team.
